bacteria.name: Bacteria
bacteria.description: Harmful bacteria like E. coli and Salmonella cause severe gastrointestinal illness.

viruses.name: Viruses
viruses.description: Waterborne viruses including Hepatitis A and Norovirus spread through contaminated water.

protozoa.name: Protozoa
protozoa.description: Parasites like Giardia and Cryptosporidium are resistant to chlorine and cause diarrhoea.

turbidity.name: Turbidity / Sediment
turbidity.description: Suspended particles that make water cloudy and can harbour pathogens.

heavy_metals.name: Heavy Metals
heavy_metals.description: Lead, arsenic, and mercury cause serious long-term health effects.

chlorine.name: Chlorine / Taste & Odour
chlorine.description: Residual chlorine from municipal treatment causes unpleasant taste and odour.

nitrates.name: Nitrates
nitrates.description: High nitrate levels from agriculture are dangerous especially for infants.

fluoride.name: Fluoride
fluoride.description: Excess fluoride causes dental and skeletal fluorosis.

boiling.name: Boiling
boiling.description: The most accessible disinfection method — kills bacteria, viruses, and protozoa.

biosand.name: Biosand Filter
biosand.description: A DIY sand filter with a biological layer that removes pathogens and turbidity.

ceramic_filtration.name: Ceramic Filtration
ceramic_filtration.description: Porous ceramic pots remove bacteria, protozoa, and suspended solids.

activated_carbon.name: Activated Carbon
activated_carbon.description: Adsorbs chlorine, pesticides, and heavy metals through a porous carbon block.

uv_disinfection.name: UV Disinfection
uv_disinfection.description: Ultraviolet light destroys the DNA of bacteria, viruses, and protozoa.

reverse_osmosis.name: Reverse Osmosis
reverse_osmosis.description: A semi-permeable membrane removes virtually all dissolved contaminants.

chlorination.name: Chlorination
chlorination.description: Adding chlorine tablets or solution disinfects water and provides residual protection.

sediment_5um.name: Sediment Filter 5µm
sediment_5um.description: Removes sand, rust, and suspended particles down to 5 microns.

activated_carbon_block.name: Activated Carbon Block
activated_carbon_block.description: Removes chlorine, taste, odour, and some heavy metals.

ceramic_candle.name: Ceramic Candle Filter
ceramic_candle.description: A porous ceramic element that blocks bacteria and protozoa.

biosand_diy.name: DIY Biosand Filter
biosand_diy.description: A locally built sand filter with biological filtration layer.

uv_lamp_6w.name: UV Lamp 6W
uv_lamp_6w.description: A 6-watt UV lamp for disinfecting up to 6 litres per minute.

ro_membrane_75gpd.name: RO Membrane 75 GPD
ro_membrane_75gpd.description: Reverse osmosis membrane removing dissolved salts and contaminants.

slow_sand_diy.name: DIY Slow Sand Filter
slow_sand_diy.description: A large-scale gravity filter using fine sand to remove pathogens.

chlorine_tablet.name: Chlorine Tablets (NaDCC)
chlorine_tablet.description: Sodium dichloroisocyanurate tablets for point-of-use disinfection.

basic_boil_ceramic.name: Basic Ceramic System
basic_boil_ceramic.description: A simple two-stage system using a sediment pre-filter and ceramic candle. Ideal for well and surface water.

biosand_system.name: Biosand + Chlorination
biosand_system.description: DIY biosand filter followed by chlorination for comprehensive protection in rural settings.

tap_upgrade.name: Tap Water Upgrade
tap_upgrade.description: Removes sediment and chlorine taste from municipal tap water.

mid_tier_uv.name: UV + Carbon System
mid_tier_uv.description: Sediment, carbon, and UV combination for comprehensive multi-threat protection.

full_ro_system.name: Full RO System
full_ro_system.description: Complete reverse osmosis system with UV polish — removes virtually everything.
